title: Idée Roadmap
sources: README.md: ROMAP progression and Phase 1 objectives
quests.ts: Foundational quest specifications for District C
database.sql: User roles and population limit constraints
forom-config.ts: Category and action label mappings
App.tsx: Quest rewards and pixel economy implementation
resume: The quest 'Idée Roadmap' (C0) represents the initial conceptual spark for the community’s strategic trajectory within the 10x10 Finite Rom Map grid. Located at the intersection of District C (Stratégie) and the 'Idée' action (0), this quest is the foundational step in defining how the node will evolve across its decadal mission to 'Save human communities and long-term memory'. In Phase 1: The Foundations (V1), the roadmap serves as the blueprint for populating the grid with the first 100 high-quality memos. This strategic planning is not just a document; it is a declaration of the community’s path toward the 'Awakening' of its local AI assistant, ROM. Technically, this roadmap idea is archived in the local PostgreSQL database within the 'memos' table, ensuring that the strategic DNA of the project remains sovereign and private. The Forom architecture, built with React 19 and Vite 7, allows members to navigate this evolving strategy through a spatial 5x5 viewport, providing a clear visual representation of progress toward Phase 3. The roadmap outlines the specific milestones required to transition from the 'Private Era' to the Global Public Lobby, including the rigorous population checks of 9 Super-Moderators and 1209 total users. Economically, completing the C0 quest rewards the contributor with 2 Pixels (PX) and 10 XP, supporting the redistribution of purchasing power as the server initiates its internal economy. This incentive structure is vital for encouraging 'Creators' to build the tools and content that push the mission forward. By hosting this strategy locally on hardware like an NVIDIA Jetson, the community ensures that its long-term plans are protected from centralized corporate surveillance. The roadmap also establishes the framework for the community treasury, which must eventually hold twenty-five percent of total wealth to unlock higher phases. This quest is especially critical for pilot projects like the 70 ETS Student Clubs, where a clear strategic roadmap ensures that knowledge transfer remains consistent as student generations cycle through the node. Every entry at coordinate C0 becomes a permanent part of the V1 Archive, set to be refined in V2 and finalized in V3. Ultimately, C0 transforms an abstract vision into a structured, actionable plan that secures the node’s survival. This strategic foundation is necessary for the node to maintain its architectural integrity and fulfill its mission successfully. It acts as the compass for every subsequent action in Districts D through J. This entry is now canonized for the decade. Yes.
summary: This quest initiates the community's strategic planning at coordinate C0, establishing the roadmap required to navigate the three phases of the ROMAP and achieve AI awakening.
